text:
Coverage Indicator — January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is a monthly variable that indicates whether the beneficiary was enrolled in traditional 
Medicaid fee-for-service (FFS), or whether the beneficiary was enrolled in a comprehensive medical 
managed care plan. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS DE file (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = not Medicaid FFS during month 
1 = Medicaid FFS during the month 
Null/missing = (if no Medicaid enrollment for the month — or if the plan
